nasb.text: for I say to you, I will not drink of the fruit of the vine from now on until the kingdom of God comes.”

esv.text: For I tell you that from now on I will not drink of the fruit of the vine until the kingdom of God comes.”

cnv.text: 我告訴你們，從今以後，我決不再喝這葡萄酒，直到　神的國來臨。”

ccb.text: 我告诉你们，在上帝的国降临之前，我不会再喝这葡萄酒了。”

csbs.text: 我告诉你们：从今以后我绝不喝这葡萄汁，直到神的国来临。”
